title: Community Report Record
description: Schema for a community report record in the governance system.

target_package_name.description: The canonical name of the package or model being reported.

reporter_id.description: Identifier of the party filing the report.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the report was created.

reason_category.description: The categorization of the issue being reported.

evidence_links.description: Optional list of URLs containing evidence supporting the report.

detailed_description.description: Optional detailed narrative explaining the report.
